name: Priya Sharma
review: Booked within 2 minutes. Arrived on time, packed everything with care, delivered next day. Honestly the smoothest move I've had.

name: Rohit Kumar
review: The transparent pricing was the best part. Knew every rupee upfront. Live tracking gave my family real peace of mind.

name: Ananya Mehta
review: Compared 12 vendors in one screen. Picked one with full insurance. Zero damage, zero stress, zero hidden fees.

name: Vikram Khanna
review: Smooth end to end. The live tracking feature is a game-changer. Felt in control the entire time.
